SEARCH
Package pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic

Class BuildingInfoTransformer

java.lang.Object
pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.BuildingInfoTransformer
public class BuildingInfoTransformer extends Object
Core business logic service for the Building Info application.

Provides methods to query and compute statistics for any Location (building, level, or room) within a Building structure. This class is the primary entry point for all domain calculations.

Example usage:

     BuildingInfoTransformer service = new BuildingInfoTransformer();
     double area = service.getArea(building);
     List<Room> hotRooms = service.getRoomsExceedingHeatingThreshold(building, 200.0);

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Optional<Level>
    findLevel(Building building, int id)
    Finds a Level within a building by its id.
    Optional<Room>
    findRoom(Building building, int id)
    Finds a Room anywhere within a building by its id.
    double
    getArea(Location location)
    Returns the total floor area of the given location in m².
    double
    getCube(Location location)
    Returns the total volume (cubature) of the given location in m³.
    double
    getHeatingPerCube(Location location)
    Returns the average heating energy consumption per m³ of volume for the given location.
    double
    getLightPerArea(Location location)
    Returns the average lighting power per m² of floor area for the given location.
    List<Room>
    getRoomsExceedingHeatingThreshold(Building building, double threshold)
    Returns all rooms within a building whose heating energy consumption per m³ exceeds the given threshold.

  • Constructor Details

    • BuildingInfoTransformer

      public BuildingInfoTransformer()

  • Method Details

    • getArea

      public double getArea(Location location)
      Returns the total floor area of the given location in m².
      Parameters:
      location - any location (building, level, or room)
      Returns:
      total area in m²

    • getCube

      public double getCube(Location location)
      Returns the total volume (cubature) of the given location in m³.
      Parameters:
      location - any location (building, level, or room)
      Returns:
      total volume in m³

    • getLightPerArea

      public double getLightPerArea(Location location)
      Returns the average lighting power per m² of floor area for the given location.
      Parameters:
      location - any location (building, level, or room)
      Returns:
      average light per m²; 0 if area is zero

    • getHeatingPerCube

      public double getHeatingPerCube(Location location)
      Returns the average heating energy consumption per m³ of volume for the given location.
      Parameters:
      location - any location (building, level, or room)
      Returns:
      average heating per m³; 0 if volume is zero

    • getRoomsExceedingHeatingThreshold

      public List<Room> getRoomsExceedingHeatingThreshold(Building building, double threshold)
      Returns all rooms within a building whose heating energy consumption per m³ exceeds the given threshold.

      Delegates to HeatingThresholdVisitor, which traverses the Composite hierarchy via accept / visit double dispatch.

      Parameters:
      building - the building to search
      threshold - the maximum acceptable heating consumption per m³
      Returns:
      list of rooms exceeding the threshold; never null

    • findLevel

      public Optional<Level> findLevel(Building building, int id)
      Finds a Level within a building by its id.
      Parameters:
      building - the building to search
      id - the level id to look for
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the level if found, or empty

    • findRoom

      public Optional<Room> findRoom(Building building, int id)
      Finds a Room anywhere within a building by its id.
      Parameters:
      building - the building to search
      id - the room id to look for
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the room if found, or empty
